reviews.review_description: Hey Devs, listen,  if you can make this app in to a functioning home where I can sit down, operate the TV, lay in the bed, you know, simple things,  I would pay whatever price you set! I don't know how you were able to squeeze such high quality and detail on minimal storage and have it functional on a stand-alone headset, but I'm very impressed! Best looking app on the quest thus far.  I have been looking for something like this for years. Finally, I found it but it's not quite functional.  I understand it was made for completely different purposes, but if you can please create something for us who wants our own real life virtual home. Thanks!
I dont have an email address!!!
